name: Uniswap V3 LP Auto-Rebalance
description: Automatically rebalance a Uniswap V3 concentrated liquidity position when the current price drifts outside the configured range plus buffer zone. Exits the existing position, collects all fees, computes the optimal token split for the new range, rebalances via a swap, then mints a fresh position centered around the current price. Optionally compounds collected fees back into the new position. Automation condition: shouldRebalance(positionManager, tokenId, bufferBps) returns true.
triggers: rebalance uniswap position when out of range
compound fees and rebalance uniswap lp

params.name: pool
params.description: Address of the Uniswap V3 pool to provide liquidity in (e.g., the WETH/USDC 0.3% pool)

params.name: tokenId
params.description: NFT token ID of the existing Uniswap V3 LP position to rebalance

params.name: rangeBps
params.description: Half-width of the LP price range in basis points (e.g., 500 = ±5% range around current price). Maps to the Uniswap V3 tick range passed to mint.

params.name: bufferBps
params.description: Buffer zone before triggering a rebalance in basis points (e.g., 200 = won't rebalance until price is 2% past the range edge). Prevents excessive rebalancing near range boundaries.

params.name: compoundFees
params.description: Whether to roll collected trading fees back into the new LP position capital (true/false). When true, fees increase the deposited amounts in mint-position.

steps.label: Remove all liquidity from current position
Collect accrued fees and freed liquidity tokens
Compute optimal token amounts for the new price range
Swap to achieve optimal token ratio for new range
Mint new LP position centered around current price

examples.input: Auto-rebalance my WETH/USDC Uniswap V3 LP position when it goes out of range, ±5% range with a 2% buffer, and compound fees
Keep my ETH/USDC Uniswap position rebalanced with a ±10% range and 3% buffer, don't compound fees

conditionTemplate.description: Triggers rebalance when the position price moves outside the configured range plus the buffer zone. Uses shouldRebalance(positionManager, tokenId, bufferBps) from the UniswapV3LPHelper contract.
